channel.title: Lucaji’s GitHub Pages
channel.description: Recent content on Lucaji’s GitHub Pages

item.title: mytuna
item.description: ‘mytuna’ is a little organiser for stringed instruments tunings, note recognition, and with the included sine wave tone generator, it can be used as a signal generator for DIY projects. Supports iCloud Drive and CSV file format to share, merge and edit the entire Tunings Library with your favourite spreadsheet.

item.title: CHATea 1.1
item.description: A free messaging app for iOS using wifi and bluetooth connectivity between nearby devices. Released version 1.1 with bug fixes and improved chat interface.

item.title: Antoine App - discontinued
item.description: This little app had the Little Prince’s story with translations in four different languages and included a shoot-em-all game with original music.

item.title: Start Rec App
item.description: Multicamera app for iOS: synchronized recording and time lapse support.

item.title: Alessandra Arcieri - Proiezione Origami - Book Cover
item.description: I made the cover design for this enthralling cyberzen book.

item.title: Diretta Iniezione
item.description: Audio preamplifier for dynamic microphones. Performs a FET input stage with high linearity and large bandwidth. XLR input with gain control and mini-jack 3.5mm line output.

item.title: Drawings, logos, misc
item.description: This is a collection of miscellaneous works, ideas, drafts that may have been used, reused, changed, forgotten…

item.title: Fliers 'Campari Soda Ants' jam session night in Serramonacesca
item.description: I designed these leaflets for the jam session night at Bar dello Sport, Serramonacesca using the images of Tjalas, the aboriginal name for this specimen of honey pot ants from central Australia, with their abdomen swollen with the sweetest honey you could ever think of.

item.title: Back To The Future alarm clock
item.description: A full working replica of the time machine circuits from the Back To The Future blockbuster. Apart from actual time travel, it acts as a talking alarm clock.

item.title: Theremin by lookaji
item.description: A mighty theremin build from an open source project with Arduino.

item.title: Tube Amps by lookaji
item.description: I built a series of tube amps tested at both at home and on the road that performed nicely.

item.title: Lorena Fontana - A Vision - The Making Of
item.description: This video is about the studio recording of the Cd A Vision by Lorena Fontana, recorded in Los Angeles in January and August 2012.

item.title: Rustiko 1st Edition Graphic Design
item.description: The old style Risiko table game graphics and packaging design. Instead of the world maps, features only Abruzzo’s map so that you conquer the provinces.

item.title: Fire Makers Metal Empire - Demo
item.description: My contribution to the keyboard sounds and a CD cover draft for ’Metal Empire’ from the metal band ’Fire Makers’. Featuring Eugent Bushpepa at the vocals.
